bugs.error_message: PowerShell reports: cannot load C:\Users\Admin\Documents\WindowsPowerShell\Microsoft.PowerShell_profile.ps1 because script execution is disabled
bugs.root_cause: PowerShell execution policy blocks the user profile script, causing every shell command to emit noisy errors.
bugs.fix: Not fixed in this review; use powershell -NoProfile for commands or adjust/remove the profile after user approval.

bugs.error_message: AGENTS.md references @RTK.md, but D:\zhihu\zhihu\RTK.md was not found
bugs.root_cause: The project instruction file points to a missing root-level RTK.md include.
bugs.fix: Not fixed; recorded for handoff because Windows Run Owner should not alter project instruction structure without user direction.

bugs.error_message: python zhihuTTS.py validation commands timed out in the runner after preprocessing/Gemini phases
bugs.root_cause: The full daily batch can run longer than the tool timeout; one run was interrupted during Gemini send and a retry later proved cache reuse.
bugs.fix: No code change on Windows. Captured the timeout in runs/windows-whispercpp-validation-20260516.md and verified retry reused cache before completing the video.

bugs.error_message: git pull --ff-only failed with curl 28: Failed to connect to github.com port 443 after 75008 ms
bugs.root_cause: Network connection to GitHub timed out while updating the stream worktree.
bugs.fix: Used the already-fetched origin/feature/stream-transcript-validation ref and fast-forwarded the worktree with git merge --ff-only.

bugs.error_message: git push origin feature/stream-transcript-validation failed with curl 28 after 75012 ms
bugs.root_cause: Network connection to GitHub timed out while sending the new stream extractor commit.
bugs.fix: Fixed by retrying with git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 push origin feature/stream-transcript-validation.

bugs.error_message: Stream media URLs can expire or disconnect during live/replay validation, causing ffmpeg slicing to fail before a chunk is transcribed.
bugs.root_cause: The runner previously retried only the same signed media URL; once the URL expired or the media connection became invalid, there was no page-level refresh path.
bugs.fix: Added StreamSliceError handling and chunk-scoped recovery that re-runs the page extractor for --page-url inputs, retries temporary extraction/probe failures within the same budget, probes the refreshed URL, and retries the failed chunk while recording recovery details.

bugs.error_message: Monkeypatch recovery test failed with TypeError: ExtractedStream.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'source_page_url'
bugs.root_cause: The ad hoc test used an old field name; ExtractedStream uses page_url.
bugs.fix: Corrected the test fixture to construct ExtractedStream with page_url, then reran the recovery test successfully.

bugs.error_message: git add failed with fatal: Unable to create '/Users/caojiapeng/projects/zhihu/.git/worktrees/zhihu-stream-validation/index.lock': Operation not permitted
bugs.root_cause: The linked worktree stores Git metadata under the main repository .git/worktrees directory, which is outside the sandbox writable root for /private/tmp.
bugs.fix: Reran git add with escalated permissions so Git could update the worktree index lock.

bugs.error_message: rg failed with docs/STREAM_AUTOMATION_PLAN_20260517.md: No such file or directory
bugs.root_cause: The stream worktree does not contain that documentation file even though the main worktree anatomy listed it.
bugs.fix: Continued with docs/STREAM_SENSEVOICE_RUNBOOK.md and live stream files present in the stream validation worktree.

bugs.error_message: cleanup slice monkeypatch test failed with KeyError: 'duration_s'
bugs.root_cause: The ad hoc test fixture passed an incomplete source_summary missing duration_s, while write_report expects source duration metadata.
bugs.fix: Reran the cleanup-slices test with duration_s, size_bytes, video, and audio fields in source_summary; the slice was deleted after report output as expected.

bugs.error_message: apply_patch verification failed while replacing run_validation for Playwright keepalive integration
bugs.root_cause: The expected hunk text did not exactly match the current stream worktree after the latest Windows documentation fast-forward.
bugs.fix: Split the change into smaller hunks: import/start helper, recovery hook, run_validation replacement, and parser arguments.

bugs.error_message: zsh startup prints compinit:527: no such file or directory: /usr/local/share/zsh/site-functions/_brew_services
bugs.root_cause: The shell completion cache references a missing Homebrew service completion file.
bugs.fix: Not fixed in this task; command output still completed successfully, but future sessions should expect this noisy local shell warning.

bugs.error_message: SenseVoice 未返回有效转写文本 — aborted 28/30 chunk bilibili live validation run
bugs.root_cause: _transcribe_sensevoice() raises RuntimeError when VAD detects zero speech segments. Live streams frequently have music-only or silent intermission chunks where no speech is present. The hard error aborts the entire multi-chunk run instead of skipping the silent chunk.
bugs.fix: Not fixed on Windows (Run Owner boundary). Handoff to Mac: change the empty-segments check at zhihuTTS_video.py:317-318 from raise RuntimeError to return {"segments": [], "sensevoice": {...}} with a print warning. Also ensure zhihuTTS_stream.py process_slice() handles empty segments gracefully (write report with speech_detected: false).

bugs.error_message: Playwright 未拦截到 .m3u8/.mpd/.flv/.mp4 媒体请求 on live.bilibili.com
bugs.root_cause: Bilibili's live player loads inside a cross-origin iframe or uses MSE (Media Source Extensions), so Playwright's page-level network interception sees no direct media requests. This is a platform limitation, not a code defect. The auto-routing in extract_stream() correctly sends bilibili to yt-dlp.
bugs.fix: No code change needed. Confirmed that --extractor auto correctly routes live.bilibili.com → yt-dlp. Document as a known platform limitation in docs/STREAM_SENSEVOICE_RUNBOOK.md: Playwright extraction is for zhihu.com and unknown hosts; bilibili/douyin/youtube should always use yt-dlp.

bugs.error_message: zhihu_url 回放输出质量 6.3/10，远低于 zhihu_file 的 8+/10
bugs.root_cause: build_final_markdown.py 只做机械排版，从不调用 Gemini。缺少 PROMPT_TEXT 驱动的全视频知识提炼，导致输出缺少元数据/Glossary/金句/视觉内容描述。帧数上限50对3小时视频过低，PROMPT 缺少中文AI领域背景提示，thinking_budget=0 减弱结构分析能力。
bugs.fix: build_final_markdown.py 末尾加 Gemini 合成：复用 GEMINI_PROMPT_TEXT + 中文AI背景段，优先级帧采样(slide>annot>ctx)上限100帧，thinking_budget=4096，自动续写20次，输出到 Markdowns/TTS_replay-*.md。

bugs.error_message: replay transcript has no accurate timestamps — entire 171-min video mapped to [0, 10299s] single segment
bugs.root_cause: FunASR/SenseVoice 1.3.1 never returns sentence_info regardless of merge_vad setting (confirmed by WIN debug_output.txt). Feeding the entire MP4 at once gives one segment with no per-sentence timestamps.
bugs.fix: Rewrote transcribe_replay.py to split audio into REPLAY_CHUNK_S (default 60s) slices via ffmpeg, run _transcribe_sensevoice() on each chunk WAV, then offset segment timestamps by chunk_start_s before merging. Mirrors the stream-mode approach in zhihuTTS_stream.py.
